sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35134" key="e(ndeka/xordos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑνδεκάχορδος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n35134.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eleven-stringed</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λύρα</foreign> Ion Eleg.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0012.tlg002.perseus-grc1:3:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
